design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('AI agent to build websites|use_case|founders, operators, creators|2026-07-06T05:28:18.417145+00:00') → hero=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, implementation-checklist], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Attention(hero), Interest(proof+bento), Desire(media+workflow), Action(CTA band). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (editorial weight, wide headlines). Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp ensures 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA, contrast verified.
headline: AI agent to build websites — research, code, deploy, and iterate with real computer use

site_brief.audience: founders, operators, and creators who want an AI agent to build and publish websites
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'AI agent to build websites', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: AI agent to build websites
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can research, generate, push to GitHub, publish, and iterate website assets with real computer-use workflows

summary: A practical operator guide showing how founders, operators, and creators can use Super as an AI agent to research requirements, generate code, push to GitHub, deploy, and iterate on websites using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache.
